Salicylic Acid (BHA 1_2%) → Unclogs pores and reduces acne formation OR Benzoyl Peroxide (2.5%) → Kills acne-causing bacteria (spot treatment)
Lightweight Moisturizer → Repairs skin barrier and prevents dryness

note: Focuses on controlling mild acne while maintaining normal skin balance. Combines pore cleansing and gentle treatment to reduce breakouts without irritation.
